summary: Made surgical seam edits to give chapter 3 a distinct opening construction from the adjacent handoff and to point the ending more directly into Nina's next outing without changing scene beats or character dynamics.
edits: Reframed the opening around the cold windscreen and Beni's first physical action instead of a time-led morning arrival.
Kept the morning school-run setup and Belgravia atmosphere intact while preserving tone and narrative information.
Tightened the final paragraph so Nina's call hands off more directly into the next chapter's drive.
